title: Variational Inference
summary: A method for approximating complex probability distributions using simpler distributions. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Bayesian Inference. Start after Model Inference. It opens into Variational Inference Techniques and Variational Inference Enhancements.

blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is

panels.label: What it is not

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask how it differs from nearby concepts and what changes when the term is applied. Compare it against Prior Probability and Posterior Probability so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
panels.body: Review Model Inference first, then move toward Variational Inference Techniques and Variational Inference Enhancements.
